input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.2.2
            TITLE: insulating tape or paint may be part of the insulation, but must not be the only insulation.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.2.2: Insulating tape or paint may be part of the insulation, but must not be the only insulation.
EV.6.2.2 Insulating tape or paint may be part of the insulation, but must not be the only insulation.

final_answer: Insulating tape or paint may be part of the insulation, but must not be the only insulation.
